paragraphs.text: 我种了一颗小种子。每天给它浇水、晒太阳。
paragraphs.translation: I planted a little seed. Every day I water it and give it sunshine.

paragraphs.text: 过了几天，小种子发芽了，长出两片小叶子。
paragraphs.translation: After a few days, the seed sprouted and grew two small leaves.

paragraphs.text: 小苗越长越高，开出了一朵美丽的花！种花真开心。
paragraphs.translation: The seedling grows taller and taller, and blooms into a beautiful flower! Growing flowers is so joyful.
